login.chooseProfile: Scegli il tuo profilo per continuare

forgotPassword.title: Password dimenticata

resetPassword.passwordMinLength: La password deve avere almeno 6 caratteri.

blocked.title: Pagamento in sospeso

blocked.message2: Regularizza il pagamento per ripristinare l'accesso. Una volta confermato, gli allenamenti saranno sbloccati.
blocked.whatsappMessage: Ciao! Vorrei regularizzare il pagamento per sbloccare l'accesso agli allenamenti.

register.identitySubtitle: Your name will appear to students in the app.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters.

account.deletePersonalDesc: Permanently removes your trainer account, all students, workouts and associated data. This cannot be undone.
account.deleteStudentDesc: Permanently removes your student profile, workout history and progress. This cannot be undone.
account.personalBullet1: Your trainer account will be removed
account.personalBullet2: All your students will be deleted
account.personalBullet3: Workouts, messages and history will be erased
account.studentBullet1: Your student profile will be removed
account.studentBullet2: Your workout history and progress will be erased
account.studentBullet3: You will need a new registration to use the app again
account.confirmPasswordIntro: Enter your password to confirm your identity:
account.acknowledge: I understand all my data will be permanently deleted and I cannot recover this account.
account.deleteError: Could not delete account. Please try again.

legal.disclosure: Gym Code Pro Monthly — auto-renewing subscription every 1 month. Price shown on App Store/Google Play at purchase will be charged and renewed unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the current period ends.
legal.cancelHow: Cancel in Settings → Apple ID → Subscriptions (iOS) or play.google.com → Subscriptions (Android).

preview.title: Preview — student view
preview.simulationHint: Simulation of how the student will see the app on mobile
